run: MT-TrajNet final, seeded, grouped CV, held-out calibration split
setup: 3-fold GroupKFold on product code, early stopping, stride-2, MAXLEN 6000, hidden 128
note: holding out a dedicated calibration partition within each fold reduces training data and increases RMSE, but ensures calibration scale estimation and prediction accuracy are evaluated on independent data; under this pipeline MT-TrajNet does not beat the dummy mean predictor on dissolution, hardness or tensile
